title: Replacement for Henry Hoover Bags - Compatible with Henry, Hetty, NVM-1CH Vacuum Bag (10 Bags & 10 Freshners)
features: 【Made for Henry】NuClean replacement Henry Hoover bags fit and seal perfectly, just like the originals, ensuring consistent suction and reliable cleaning performance. Compatible with Numatic Henry, Hetty Hoover, Harry, and James models.

【Large 9L Capacity】Our replacement Henry vacuum bags have a large 9-litre capacity. Many compatible bags on Amazon are 50% smaller, but NuClean bags match the size and performance of the genuine Henry originals, meaning fewer bag changes and better value.

【Zero Dust, Zero Fuss】Strong, durable, and multi-layered, these Henry Hoover dust bags trap up to 99% of fine dust and pet hair for a cleaner, fresher home. The secure seal prevents leaks so all the mess stays inside the bag.

【Precise Fit】Designed for optimal airflow and suction, NuClean bags fit tightly without splitting or slipping. Using high-quality bags like ours helps your Henry perform at its best every time. NuClean — where good design meets good value.

【Fresh-Scented Air Sticks Included】Each box includes lightly fragranced air sticks, giving you Henry Hoover bags with fresheners that neutralise odours and keep both your vacuum and your home smelling clean.

【NuClean Replacement】Please note, this product is not made by Numatic and is designed as a compatible replacement for your Henry. The Numatic and Henry names and part numbers are used for reference only.
